name: lio
description: Lio is a macOS desktop app that connects Gemini 3.1 Flash Live to local Slack, Notion, and Apple CLIs.
author: Sankalp Singh

scripts.check: node --check src/main.mjs && node --check src/live/agent-service.mjs && node --check src/live/tool-registry.mjs && node --check src/live/cli-runner.mjs && node --check src/preload.cjs && node --check src/renderer/app.js
scripts.pack: npm run build:icons && npm run build:native-helper && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build:icons && npm run build:native-helper && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never
